name: codeweb
description: See what an edit breaks before you write it: codeweb maps the repo into a deterministic call/import graph — a self-contained interactive HTML map for you, and 27 deterministic read-only query tools over MCP (impact, callers, duplication, risk, dead code, …) for the coding agent editing alongside you. /codeweb builds the map; hooks brief every session and impact-check every edit. Works on the current project or any external repo you want to review before adopting.
